name: frontend-e2e
// targets: to see all targets run: nx show project frontend-e2e --web

e2e.// dependsOn: CI starts api:serve and frontend:serve-e2e itself, outside of any nx process, before this target runs (see .github/workflows/ci.yml). Clearing this stops @nx/playwright/plugin from also scheduling api:serve as a task here, which would otherwise race the CI-started one for port 3000.
